rationale: Educ. Code §21.204 governs teacher term contracts and is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.204. TERM CONTRACT. (a) A term contract must be in writing and must include the terms of employment prescribed by this subchapter.
_note: Rule text concerns teacher employment contracts; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
